svg.title: pandyaHomeLab cross-platform deployment preview
svg.desc: Visitor enters at apex landing page on pandyahomelab.com, which offers two prominent links: View on NAS leads to the full NAS-hosted platform with prod-nas and dev-nas stacks, View on AWS leads to a minimal AWS serving layer at aws.pandyahomelab.com. NAS holds canonical state including MLflow, MinIO, Postgres. AWS is stateless, with only a small EBS volume for TLS certs and Docker cache.
svg.text: Stage 2 in-progress preview · subject to revision as ADRs 008–012 lock

g.text: One git clone serves both stacks

svg.text: Teal · NAS (canonical, full platform) · Blue · AWS (stateless serving subset)
